Jermaine Coleman is on welfare and was the first to move in, and Abdulrahman Badawi is an one percenter and moved in shortly after. Jermaine Coleman seemed friendly at first, but ended up getting kicked out after only a week for threatening other tenants and destroying parts of the building. I'm still getting along great with Abdulrahman Badawi, though.
